# Activity Intents Specifications

> Technical specifications for the MainActivity intent handling

**Status**: DRAFT  
**Type**: SDD (Spec-Driven Development)  
**Generated by**: /legacy analysis  
**Date**: 2026-03-04

---

## Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              External Trigger                            │
│  ├─ Browser (clicks tel: link)                          │
│  ├─ Other App (sends intent)                            │
│  ├─ Voice Assistant (dial command)                      │
│  └─ QR Scanner (reads tel: URL)                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                            │
                            ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│         Android Intent Resolver                         │
│  ├─ Finds apps with matching intent filters             │
│  └─ Shows chooser (if multiple matches)                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                            │
                            ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              MainActivity (Kotlin)                      │
│  ├─ extends FlutterActivity                             │
│  │                                                      │
│  ├─ onNewIntent(intent)                                 │
│  │   ├─ Check action (VIEW/DIAL)                        │
│  │   ├─ Validate data (null, scheme)                    │
│  │   └─ Extract phone number                            │
│  │                                                      │
│  └─ (Future) Communicate to Flutter                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                            │
                            ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│         (Future) Flutter Dart Code                      │
│  ├─ Receive phone number via method channel             │
│  ├─ Display in UI                                       │
│  └─ Use with FlutterDialer API                          │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## Class Specification

### Class: MainActivity

**Package**: `org.tele.flutter_dialer`

**Inheritance**: Extends `FlutterActivity`

**Purpose**: Handle incoming tel: scheme intents

```kotlin
class MainActivity: FlutterActivity() {
    companion object {
        private const val TAG = "MainActivity"
    }

    override fun onNewIntent(intent: Intent) {
        super.onNewIntent(intent)
        Log.d(TAG, "onNewIntent: ${intent.action}")

        // Handle tel: scheme intents
        if (intent.action == Intent.ACTION_VIEW || 
            intent.action == Intent.ACTION_DIAL) {
            val data = intent.data
            if (data != null && data.scheme == "tel") {
                val phoneNumber = data.schemeSpecificPart
                Log.d(TAG, "Received phone number: $phoneNumber")

                // TODO: Handle phone number
                // Options:
                // 1. Pass to Flutter via method channel
                // 2. Auto-dial
                // 3. Show in UI
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## Intent Filter Specification

### Filter 1: Full tel: Scheme

**Location**: `android/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml`

```xml
<intent-filter>
    <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" />
    <action android:name="android.intent.action.DIAL" />
    <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" />
    <data android:scheme="tel"/>
</intent-filter>
```

**Matching Rules**:
- Action MUST be VIEW or DIAL
- Category MUST include DEFAULT
- Data scheme MUST be tel:
- BROWSABLE allows browser launching

**Use Cases**:
- Browser clicks `tel:+1234567890`
- Email client tel: links
- QR code scanner results
- Other app intents

---

### Filter 2: Simple DIAL

```xml
<intent-filter>
    <action android:name="android.intent.action.DIAL"/>
    <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT"/>
</intent-filter>
```

**Matching Rules**:
- Action MUST be DIAL
- Category MUST include DEFAULT
- No data scheme restriction

**Use Cases**:
- System dialer chooser
- Voice assistant commands
- General dial requests

---

## Intent Handling Flow

### onNewIntent Implementation

**Signature**:
```kotlin
override fun onNewIntent(intent: Intent)
```

**Flow**:
```
Intent received
      │
      ▼
Log action: Log.d(TAG, "onNewIntent: ${intent.action}")
      │
      ▼
Check action == VIEW or DIAL
      │
      ▼
Get intent.data (Uri)
      │
      ▼
Validate: data != null && data.scheme == "tel"
      │
      ▼
Extract: phoneNumber = data.schemeSpecificPart
      │
      ▼
Log: Log.d(TAG, "Received phone number: $phoneNumber")
      │
      ▼
(Future) Handle phone number
```

---

## Phone Number Extraction

### URI Structure

**tel: URI Format** (RFC 3966):
```
tel:[phone-number]
```

**Examples**:
```
tel:+1-555-123-4567
tel:1234567890
tel:*123#
tel:911
```

### Extraction Code

```kotlin
val data: Uri? = intent.data
if (data != null) {
    val scheme: String? = data.scheme
    if (scheme == "tel") {
        val phoneNumber: String? = data.schemeSpecificPart
        // phoneNumber contains everything after "tel:"
    }
}
```

### schemeSpecificPart Values

| Input URI | schemeSpecificPart |
|-----------|-------------------|
| `tel:+1-555-123-4567` | `+1-555-123-4567` |
| `tel:1234567890` | `1234567890` |
| `tel:*123#` | `*123#` |
| `tel:911` | `911` |
| `tel:` | `` (empty string) |

---

## Validation Chain

### Step 1: Action Validation

```kotlin
if (intent.action == Intent.ACTION_VIEW || 
    intent.action == Intent.ACTION_DIAL)
```

**Accepted Actions**:
- `Intent.ACTION_VIEW` ("android.intent.action.VIEW")
- `Intent.ACTION_DIAL` ("android.intent.action.DIAL")

**Rejected Actions**:
- `Intent.ACTION_CALL` (different action)
- Any other action

---

### Step 2: Null Check

```kotlin
val data = intent.data
if (data != null)
```

**Handles**:
- Malformed intents without data
- Intents with only action (no URI)

---

### Step 3: Scheme Validation

```kotlin
if (data.scheme == "tel")
```

**Accepted Schemes**:
- `tel` only

**Rejected Schemes**:
- `http`, `https` (web URLs)
- `mailto` (email)
- `file` (local files)
- Any other scheme

---

## Security Considerations

### Input Validation (Recommended)

```kotlin
fun isValidPhoneNumber(phone: String): Boolean {
    if (phone.isBlank() || phone.length > 20) return false
    
    // Allow: digits, +, *, #, -, spaces
    val validPattern = Pattern.compile("^[0-9+*#\\-\\s]+$")
    return validPattern.matcher(phone).matches()
}
```

### Potential Attacks

| Attack | Mitigation |
|--------|------------|
| Malformed URI | Scheme validation |
| Very long strings | Length limit |
| Script injection | Character whitelist |
| USSD exploitation | Block * and # if not needed |

---

## Future Implementation: Flutter Communication

### Method Channel Pattern

**Android Side**:
```kotlin
private lateinit var methodChannel: MethodChannel

override fun onNewIntent(intent: Intent) {
    // ... extraction code ...
    
    methodChannel.invokeMethod("onReceivedPhoneNumber", phoneNumber)
}
```

**Flutter Side**:
```dart
methodChannel.setMethodCallHandler((call) async {
  if (call.method == 'onReceivedPhoneNumber') {
    final phoneNumber = call.arguments as String;
    // Update UI, store number, etc.
  }
});
```

---

## Logging Specification

### Log Tag

```kotlin
private const val TAG = "MainActivity"
```

### Log Messages

| Location | Level | Message |
|----------|-------|---------|
| onNewIntent entry | Debug | "onNewIntent: [action]" |
| Phone received | Debug | "Received phone number: [number]" |

### Log Format

```
D/MainActivity: onNewIntent: android.intent.action.VIEW
D/MainActivity: Received phone number: +1-555-123-4567
```

---

## Testing Strategy

### Unit Tests (Robolectric)

```kotlin
@Test
fun onNewIntent_telViewAction_extractsPhoneNumber() {
    // Arrange
    val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW).apply {
        data = Uri.parse("tel:+1-555-123-4567")
    }
    
    // Act
    activity.onNewIntent(intent)
    
    // Assert
    // Verify phone number was extracted
    // Verify log contains number
}

@Test
fun onNewIntent_nullData_doesNotCrash() {
    // Arrange
    val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW).apply {
        data = null
    }
    
    // Act & Assert
    // Should not crash
}

@Test
fun onNewIntent_nonTelScheme_ignoresIntent() {
    // Arrange
    val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW).apply {
        data = Uri.parse("http://example.com")
    }
    
    // Act
    activity.onNewIntent(intent)
    
    // Assert
    // Should not extract phone number
}
```

- [x] Validate intent data (null check)
- [x] Validate scheme (tel:)
- [x] Extract phone number
- [x] Log received phone number
- [ ] Add phone number validation
- [ ] Implement Flutter communication
- [ ] Add business logic (auto-dial or UI update)
- [ ] Add unit tests
- [ ] Test with real tel: links
